items.hook: Problem Child 3: Junior in Love is a 1995 American children's television film directed by Greg Beeman and written by Michael Hitchcock.
items.body: It is the third and final installment of the Problem Child trilogy created by Scott Alexander and Larry Karaszewski. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Sana Iqbal was an Indian solo female cross-country biker.
items.body: She did counseling on her Facebook page and helped students lead happy and meaningful lives by guiding them towards practicality and positivity. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: This junction, one of the city's most important, is named for its octagonal shape.
items.body: Oktogon is one of Pest's major intersections, located at the junction of the Grand Boulevard and Andrássy Avenue in Budapest, Hungary. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: The Battle of Dyrrachium took place from April to late July 48 BC near the city of Dyrrachium, modern day Durrës in what is now Albania.
items.body: It was fought between Gaius Julius Caesar and an army led by Gnaeus Pompey during Caesar's civil war. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: Tshiamo is a Tswana given name meaning "bless with divine, righteousness or goodness".
items.body: Notable people with the name include:Tshiamo Modisane, South African author, activist and television personality Tshiamo Tshotetsi, South African politician The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: The ancient Silk Road city that has a lesson for Silicon Valley

items.hook: Kilby is a village and civil parish in the Blaby district of Leicestershire, England.
items.body: Kilby is the easternmost village in the district, and is 6.1 miles (9.8 km) south east of Leicester. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.
